SOME BUSINESS LAPTOPS WITH INTEGRATED GRAPHIC CARD WERE ABLE TO RUN THIS GAME ON A VERY LOW GRAPHICS SETTINGS, AS WE IMPLEMENTED SPECIAL FEATURE WHICH RESCALES THE RESOLUTION. FEEL FREE TO CHECK IF YOU ACHIEVE STABLE 60 FPS ON LOW END MACHINES WHILE FREE DEMO IS AVAILABLE. 60 FPS IS NEEDED FOR SMOOTH GAMEPLAY AND IS MANDATORY FOR ONLINE GAME. PLEASE BE ADVICED THAT THE GAME, IN LOW OR VERY LOW GRAPHICS SETTINGS, DOESN'T REPRESENT FULL PRODUCT VALUE.
